nodes.name: 山地森林

nodes.name: Várzea forest
nodes.summary: Várzea forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、Spix's guan等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: viridiceps is found from Cerro Duida east into northwestern Brazil to the upper Rio Negro and west and south through southeastern Colombia, eastern Ecuador, and northeastern Peru. In the tepui region where Venezuela, Guyana, and Brazil meet, the sapphire-rumped parrotlet inhabits evergreen montane forest up to about

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Elsewhere it occurs in lowland rainforest favoring várzea, but also savanna, remaining woodlots in otherwise cleared landscapes, and isolated mountains in the Guianan lowlands. In Brazil it locally reaches
